title: Wednesday 1st October 1997
text: Well I’m here now and it’s finally sunk in – I’m here for a year, not there. I know I’ll only feel miserable for a week or two about leaving things behind so I’ll just get on and try to enjoy it. The flight left on time(ish) and was very long, the boredom not being broken at all by the three crap films. Four hours of waiting and train travelling followed this and only cost 65 quid. The Saiki’s are very nice although conversation is very hard; Japanese food may take a little longer to appreciate. Must go to bed now, it’s nearly nine o’clock; I’ve been up about 50 hours. Spent 30 mins with Saiki Jnr after this – quite good.

title: Thursday 2nd October 1997 7:00 a.m.
text: I woke up at 5:30 a.m. and can’t go back to sleep, jetlag and all. I’ve just been laying here for the last hour and a half feeling sorry for myself. ...
